top_signals.title: U.S. attacks missile sites in Iran, despite ceasefire
top_signals.summary: U.S. forces attacked missile sites in southern Iran and boats trying to lay mines on Monday, as top Iranian negotiators arrived in Doha for talks to end the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
